title: avena alba subvar. minor
intro: Avena alba subvar. minor, also known as oats or oat grass, is a type of grass belonging to the Avena genus and is a subvariety of Avena alba. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which make it useful for digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Avena alba subvar. minor include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as supporting digestive health and soothing irritated skin. The herbal preparations of Avena alba subvar. minor include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
